overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from a vessel's bridge at night. The camera faces forward over the bow while three navigation displays show radar, charts, and sonar data. A lightning flash briefly illuminates the horizon during the otherwise steady voyage through open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge facing open ocean

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship forward through open water while monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: leftmost screen showing coastal chart with yellow landmasses and blue water
center screen with circular radar display showing rotating sweep and target contacts
rightmost screen showing blue water column depth sounder readout
forward deck of the ship with railings and bow structure visible through the bridge windows
metal railing on the left side of the ship's bow
metal railing on the right side of the ship's bow
dark water surface extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge at night shows three illuminated navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and sonar. The ship moves steadily forward through calm dark waters, with the bow deck and railings visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge facing open ocean during lightning storm

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the left horizon and briefly brightens the ocean surface

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the ship forward as lightning strikes in the distance

segments.scene_description: The ship continues moving through the night as a bright lightning flash appears on the left horizon, momentarily illuminating the ocean and increasing the ambient light level before returning to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge facing open ocean

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady course through open water while monitoring the radar sweep and navigation displays

segments.scene_description: Following the lightning flash, the scene returns to steady nighttime sailing. The radar continues its rotation on the center display while the ship maintains its forward course through the dark waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady nighttime voyage from a ship's bridge that is momentarily interrupted by a sudden burst of atmospheric light. It begins with a view over the bow deck and railings, where three illuminated navigation monitors display rotating radar, charts, and sonar data against the backdrop of calm dark waters. As the vessel maintains its forward course, a bright lightning flash suddenly strikes the left horizon, momentarily flooding the ocean with light and raising the ambient visibility. The scene then shifts back into deep darkness as the flash fades, returning the environment to its previous nocturnal state. Finally, the camera continues its forward progression through the night while the radar on the center display persists in its rhythmic rotation.
